changelog:
- 配方编辑器选中区域添加清晰描边，缩放时始终可见
- 修复预览图坐标偏移问题
- 优化预览图分辨率自适应，兼顾清晰度与性能
- 提升内存使用效率与稳定性
- 修复参数面板开关偶发重复渲染的问题
changelog_en:
- Added clear outlines for selected regions in recipe editor, visible at all zoom levels
- Fixed preview image coordinate offset issue
- Optimized adaptive preview resolution for better clarity and performance
- Improved memory efficiency and stability
- Fixed occasional duplicate rendering when toggling parameter panel switches
